subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from God unto him who hath been named 'Abdu'llah, that he may remember God, the All-Subduing, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الله الی الذی سمی بعبدالله لیتذکر بذکر الله المهیمن العزیز
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @contention and conflict, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @justice and mercy
